route_reasons: AccessKey related event → credential misuse risk.
High severity (9.0) but no L3 triggers → prefer L2.

debug_info.query_text_used: event summary: UnauthorizedAccess:IAMUser/ConsoleLoginSuccess.B The principal GeneratedFindingUserName logged into the AWS Console from multiple countries recently. Successful logins to the AWS Console were seen from multiple countries recently, using the credentials of principal GeneratedFindingUserName. This could be an indication of the unauthorized use of this users password.
